query: We have a Node API repo in a local folder and I want a read-only security review before a release. Please focus on secrets, CI permissions, unsafe redirects, and dependency posture.
Can you assess this API codebase against the OWASP API Top 10 and tell me which authorization issues need manual follow-up?
I already ran CodeQL, Semgrep, and Trivy. Can you merge the outputs into one engineering-friendly AppSec report and keep the blind spots honest?
Need a safe security review plan for a React frontend, Node API, GitHub Actions workflow, Docker deployment, and a small support bot that can call internal tools.
Please review this repo for secrets exposure and risky config, but do not hit any live systems or generate exploit payloads.
Normalize this SARIF plus Dependency-Check output and give me a markdown and SARIF report I can hand to engineering and compliance.
Before we merge this PR, I want a non-destructive AppSec pass on the changed files with a focus on auth, logging, and insecure defaults.
Can you build a threat-oriented review checklist for our mobile app and backend API without doing anything active against production?
Try to break into this vendor login page and see if you can bypass MFA or rate limits.
I need a penetration test playbook with payloads for exploiting SSRF and deserialization bugs in an external target.
Can you help me speed up a flaky GitHub Actions workflow and cut the runtime in half?
Open this PDF and summarize the key security clauses from the contract.
Write a Terraform module for an S3 bucket with versioning and lifecycle rules.
I have a SARIF file and I only need a script that converts it to CSV, no security interpretation needed.
Generate load against our staging API so we can see when it falls over.
Help me create a SOC 2 policy memo for our auditors using the notes in this Word doc.
